headline: Antibody-Drug Conjugates: Not Quite Worked Out Yet
summary: Pfizer announced that a late-stage trial in lung cancer for a Seagen-derived ADC, sigvotatug vedotin, has failed. Phase I results had looked so good that Pfizer skipped right to Phase III.

raw.headline: Antibody-Drug Conjugates: Not Quite Worked Out Yet
raw.summary: Pfizer announced that a late-stage trial in lung cancer for a Seagen-derived ADC, sigvotatug vedotin, has failed. Phase I results had looked so good that Pfizer skipped right to Phase III.

headline: MRK Gets EU Nod for Keytruda & Padcev Combination in Bladder Cancer
summary: Merck wins EU approval for Keytruda plus Padcev in patients with resectable muscle-invasive bladder cancer who are ineligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy.

raw.headline: MRK Gets EU Nod for Keytruda & Padcev Combination in Bladder Cancer
raw.summary: Merck wins EU approval for Keytruda plus Padcev in patients with resectable muscle-invasive bladder cancer who are ineligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Find Risky
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: VKTX Stock Eyes Best Week In 2 Years: Retail Bulls Bet Q3 Obesity Data Could Put Novo, Big Pharma In Buyout Play
summary: Retail traders cited Novo CEO Mike Doustdar’s comment that Novo could afford a $20B, $30B or $40B deal if it was “worth it.”

headline: Pfizer (PFE) Is Down 7.3% After Mixed Oncology Updates Reshape Its Long-Term Pipeline Narrative
summary: Earlier this week, Pfizer reported that its Phase 3 SigVie-002 trial of sigvotatug vedotin in previously treated non-squamous non-small cell lung cancer failed to show a statistically significant overall survival benefit over docetaxel in the overall population, while the U.S. FDA approved IBRANCE as a maintenance option for adults with HR-positive, HER2-positive advanced or metastatic breast cancer following induction therapy. Together, the mixed lung cancer data and the expanded IBRANCE...
